subcodes.title: Words to Anna Kunz, spoken on 1921-03-29
subcodes.first_line: You have been here three days. They are equal to three years. In the Bible in the days of the Lord
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
